chain.thought: Explanation: His previous best was 5.65 m in 2006. He first exceeded this with 5.75 m at the 2010 European Championships, so the year is 2010.

judge_thought: Explanation: The table lists competition results and corresponding heights but does not explicitly identify or annotate when a “previous best” of 5.65 m was surpassed as a personal record event. Although individual heights are given (including 5.65 m in 2006 and other marks in subsequent years), the dataset does not state a specific year in which beating the “previous best” occurred. Since the table lacks an explicit indicator tying a year to “beating the previous best of 5.65 m,” the appropriate validated response is that no determinable year is provided from this data—hence the Prediction Answer “null” correctly reflects that the year cannot be derived from the table.
